title: MobCapture
description: Introduces the Capturing enchantment, allowing players to collect spawn eggs by defeating creatures with enchanted swords.
body:
Ever wished you could collect your favorite mobs as spawn eggs? With **MobCapture**, now you can!

Enchant your sword with the special Capturing enchantment and start hunting. Whenever you defeat a mob, there’s a chance it will drop its spawn egg—perfect for building farms or just showing off your collection. The higher your Capturing enchantment, the better your odds!

### How the chances work:
*   **Base Chance:** Scales with your Capturing enchantment level:
    *   Level 1: 5%
    *   Level 2: 10%
    *   Level 3: 15%
*   **Difficulty Adjustment:** Easier game difficulties increase drop odds, while harder ones reduce them.
*   **Mob Type Factor:** Hostile mobs have higher drop odds than ambient or passive creatures.
*   **Drop Chance Cap:** The final chance is always between 0.5% and 20%.

Boss mobs (like the Ender Dragon, Wither, and Elder Guardian) are **excluded**, so the challenge remains.

**Why You’ll Love MobCapture**
*   Collect Them All: Gather spawn eggs from almost any mob you defeat.
*   Build & Create: Use spawn eggs for creative builds, farms, or fun experiments.
*   Easy to Use: Just enchant your sword and play as usual!
*   Multilingual: Available in many languages for players around the world.

### How to Get Started
1.  Download the mod.
2.  Ensure you have the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) installed.
3.  Place both files in your `mods` folder.
4.  Launch Minecraft with the Fabric mod loader and start enchanting!

## Contributions

MobCapture is open source! Feel free to contribute by optimizing code, suggesting features, or helping to add support for new Minecraft versions.

Have fun collecting!
